checkuser-summary:
Qalabkani waxa uu baaraa isbeddellada dhow si uu u soo saaro ciwaannada IP ee uu isticmaalay isticmaale ama u muujiyo xogta wax-ka-beddelka/isticmaalaha ee ciwaan IP ah.
Isticmaalayaasha iyo wax-ka-beddellada ka yimaadda ciwaan IP macmiil waxaa lagu heli karaa XFF headers adigoo ku daraya ciwaanka IP-ga "/xff". IPv4 (CIDR $1-32) iyo IPv6 (CIDR $2-128) waa la taageeraa.
Lama soo celin karo wax ka badan $3 wax-ka-beddel sababo la xiriira waxqabad.
U isticmaal si waafaqsan siyaasadda.
checkuser-desc: Waxay siisaa isticmaalayaasha haysta oggolaanshaha ku habboon awood ay ku hubiyaan ciwaannada IP ee isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale.
group-temporary-account-viewer: Daawadayaasha IP-yada xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
right-checkuser: Hubi ciwaannada IP-ga isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale
right-checkuser-temporary-account: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah
right-checkuser-temporary-account-no-pre: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah adigoon shidin doorashada
right-checkuser-temporary-account-log: Eeg diiwaanka gelitaanka ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
right-checkuser-temporary-account-auto-r: Si otomaatig ah u muuji cinwaannada IP-ga ee ay isticmaalaan akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah
grant-checkuser-temporary-account: Hel xogta CheckUser ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
action-checkuser: Hubi ciwaannada IP-ga isticmaalayaasha iyo macluumaad kale
action-checkuser-temporary-account: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabo ku-meelgaar ah
action-checkuser-temporary-account-no-pr: Eeg ciwaannada IP ee ay isticmaaleen xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah

action-checkuser-temporary-account-auto-: Si otomaatig ah u muuji cinwaannada IP-ga ee ay isticmaalaan akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-cidr-label: Raadi xadka guud iyo ciwaannada IP ee saameeyay liiska ciwaannada IP
checkuser-cidr-too-small: Xadku waa aad u weyn yahay
checkuser-range-outside-limit: Xadka $1 wuu ka baxsan yahay xadka la oggol yahay.
checkuser-empty: Diiwaanku wax walxo ah kuma jiro.
checkuser-nomatch-edits: Wax is waafaqa lama helin. Wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay wuxuu ahaa $1 at $2.
checkuser-massblock-text: Isticmaal sanduuqyada calaamadaynta ee natiijooyinka kore si aad u doorato akoonnada iyo IP-yada aad rabto inaad xanibto. Kadib waxaad isticmaali kartaa badhamada hoose, kuwaas oo furi doona foomka {{#special:InvestigateBlock}} iyadoo bartilmaameedyada si hore loo buuxiyay.
checkuser-massblock-commit-ips: Xannib ciwaannada IP ee la xulay
checkuser-block-reason-dropdown:
* Sababaha caadiga ah ee xannibidda
** Isticmaalka khaldan ee xisaabo badan
** Dirista xiriirro spam ah oo loo diro bogag dibadda ah
** Burburin
checkuser-centralauth-multilock: Si badan u xannib xisaabaadka la xulay
checkuser-centralauth-multilock-list: Si badan u xannib xisaabaadka la xulay adigoo isticmaalaya xiriiriyeyaasha:
checkuser-initiator-nonexistent: Qofka bilaabay ee la cayimay ma jiro.
checkuser-search: Raadi waxyaabaha ku qoran diiwaanka hubinta isticmaalaha
checkuser-token-fail: Fadhiga wuu fashilmay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
checkuser-helper-table-collapse-by-defau: Tirada ugu yar ee safafka lagu burburinayo miiska soo koobidda {{#special:CheckUser}} marka la furo:
Isticmaal kan caadiga ah ee goobta ($1)
Mar walba burburi miiska soo koobidda marka la furo
Marna ha burburin miiska soo koobidda marka la furo
logentry-checkuser-private-event-login-s: Si guul leh {{GENDER:$2|u soo galay}} {{SITENAME}} sida $4
logentry-checkuser-private-event-login-f: {{GENDER:$2|Ku guuldarraystay}} inuu galo {{SITENAME}} sida $4 laakiin wuxuu haystay furaha sirta ah ee saxda ah
logentry-checkuser-private-event-user-lo: Si guul leh {{GENDER:$2|uga baxay}} isagoo isticmaalaya API-ga ama {{#special:logout}}
logentry-checkuser-private-event-passwor: {{GENDER:$2|diray}} iimayl dib u dejin furaha sirta ah oo loogu talagalay {{GENDER:$5|isticmaale}} $4
logentry-checkuser-private-event-autocre: si toos ah ayaa loo sameeyay
group-checkuser.css: /* Koodhka CSS ee halkan la dhigo wuxuu saameyn doonaa kaliya isticmaalayaasha CheckUser */
group-checkuser.js: /* Koodhka JavaScript ee halkan la dhigo waxaa lagu shuban doonaa kaliya isticmaalayaasha CheckUser */
checkuser-temporary-accounts-onboarding-: Soo bandhigida xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
Waa maxay xisaab ku meelgaar ah?
Sawir muujinaya astaanta isticmaale ee xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah.

Qalabka [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Trust_and_Safety_Product/IP_Info Macluumaadka IP-ga] (Macluumaadka IP-ga) waxa uu u fududeeyaa maamulayaasha, la-dagaallamayaasha burburinta iyo isticmaaleyaasha khibradda leh inay helaan xogta cinwaannada IP-ga iyaga oo aan si toos ah u arkin cinwaannada IP-ga.

Isticmaaleyaasha buuxiya shuruudaha gelitaanka waxay IP Info ka hawlgelin karaan dookhyadooda. Marka la hawlgeliyo, IP Info pop-up ayaa ka soo muuqan doona agagaarka akoonnada ku-meelgaarka ah iyo cinwaannada IP-ga ee hore. Xogta IP-ga sidoo kale waxa lagu soo bandhigi doonaa bogga wax ku biirinta.
Sawir muujinaya aaladda IPInfo oo loo adeegsanayo in lagu eego xogta xisaab ku-meelgaar ah oo ku taal bog, halkaas oo astaanta macluumaadka la gujiyay si ay u soo bandhigto sanduuq soo-baxa.
checkuser-rest-access-denied: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso falkaas
checkuser-rest-access-denied-blocked-use: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso falkaas sababtoo ah xisaabtaada waa la xannibay
checkuser-rest-userinfo-user-not-found: Lambarka aqoonsiga isticmaalaha ee la bixiyay waa khalad.
checkuser-investigateblock-usertalk-labe: Ka hortag inay wax ka beddelaan boggooda hadalka inta la xannibay
checkuser-investigateblock-notice-talk-p: Ku reeb ogeysiis bogga hadalka isticmaalaha
checkuser-investigateblock-failure: Ma jiro isticmaale la xannibay. Si aad u beddesho xannibaadaha jira, hubi: "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-reblock-label}}". Xannibaad lama beddeli doono haddii xannibaadda cusub ay la mid tahay tan hore.
checkuser-investigateblock-failure-multi: Ma jiro isticmaale la xannibay. Si aad ugu darto xannibaad kale xannibaadaha jira, hubi: "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-newblock-label}}".
checkuser-investigateblock-notices-faile: Ogeysiisyo qaar laguma dari karin bogagga isticmaalaha ama bogagga hadalka isticmaalaha.
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-ips-a: Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad isla sabab isku mid ah ku xannibto labada xisaab iyo IP-yo isku mar adigoo isticmaalaya xogta CheckUser. Tani waxay jabin kartaa siyaasadda asturnaanta ee goobta. Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad sidaas sameyso?
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-confi: Haddii aad si dhab ah u hubto inaad rabto inaad sameyso, fadlan hubi "{{int:checkuser-investigateblock-confirm-blocks-label}}" oo ku yaal hoosta.
checkuser-investigateblock-warning-users: Tirada isticmaalayaasha la xannibayo waxay ka badan tahay xadka $1. Kaliya {{PLURAL:$1|hal isticmaale ayaa|$1 isticmaalayaal ayaa}} lagu daray goobta isticmaalayaasha.
checkuser-investigate-legend: Raadi magacyada isticmaalayaasha, ciwaannada IP ama xadka IP
checkuser-investigate-tab-compare: Ciwaannada IP-ga & iyo xogta qalabka isticmaalaha
checkuser-investigate-preliminary-notice: Tab-ka macluumaadka xisaabtu kuma jiro wax xog ah oo ku saabsan IP-yada. Eeg [$1 tab-ka IP-yada iyo user agents] si aad u hesho faahfaahintaas.
checkuser-investigate-timeline-notice-no: Natiijooyin la mid ah shuruudaha shaandhaynta lama helin. Isku day in aad ka saarto qaar ka mid ah shaandhaynta si aad u ballaadhiso raadinta.
checkuser-investigate-compare-copy-messa: Ma rabtaa inaad xogtan u nuquliso sidii jadwal Wikitext ah?
checkuser-investigate-compare-notice-exc: Sababo la xiriira xaddidaado farsamo, waxaan gaarnay tirada diiwaannada la soo bandhigi karo. Xogta loo soo celiyay bartilmaameedyada soo socda ma dhammaystirna: $1. Fadlan isku day inaad isticmaasho bartilmaameedyo yar, waqti gaaban ama xad IP oo cidhiidhi ah.
checkuser-investigate-compare-notice-no-: Natiijooyin la mid ah shuruudaha shaandhaynta lama helin. Isku day in aad ka saarto shaandhayn si aad u ballaadhiso raadinta.
checkuser-ip-contributions-permission-er: Si aad u aragto wax ka beddellada xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee IP-ga, fadlan aqbal heshiiska ku jira [[Special:Preferences|dookhyadaada]].
checkuser-ip-contributions-subtitle: Natiijooyinka laga muujinayo $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmo}} ee u dambeysay.
checkuser-ip-contributions-target-error-: Geli ciwaan IP ama xad IP oo sax ah
Raadintaada lama dhammaystiri karin. Fadlan geli ciwaan IP ama xad IP oo sax ah. [[Special:Contributions/$1|Ama ku raadi magaca isticmaalaha]].
checkuser-ip-contributions-results-title: Wax ka beddellada IP ee isticmaalaha ku meelgaarka ah ee $1
checkuser-global-contributions-no-result: Natiijooyin la jaanqaadaya weydiinta lama helin. Isticmaalaha "$1" ma aha mid diiwaangashan.
checkuser-ip-contributions-archive-resul: Wax ka beddellada IP ee isticmaalaha ku-meelgaarka ah ee la tirtiray ee $1

Wax ka-beddellada IP ee isticmaale ku meelgaar ah
checkuser-ip-contributions-special-contr: Wax ka beddellada IP ee duugga ah
checkuser-global-contributions-summary: Hel wax ka beddellada uu isticmaale sameeyay dhammaan mashaariicda wiki-ga muddada $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmo}} ee u dambeysay.
checkuser-global-contributions: Raadi wax ku darsiyada caalamiga ah
checkuser-global-contributions-permissio: Si aad u aragto wax ku darsiyada caalamiga ah, fadlan aqbal heshiiska ku jira [[Special:GlobalPreferences|dookhyadaada caalamiga ah]].
checkuser-global-contributions-subtitle: Muujinta natiijooyinka $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmo}} ee u dambeysay, dhammaan wiki-yada aad xaq u leedahay inaad aragto wax ku darsiyada. Waxaa lagu xaddiday $2 {{PLURAL:$2|natiijo|natiijooyin}} wiki kasta.
checkuser-global-contributions-target-la: Magaca isticmaale, ciwaanka IP ama kala-duwanaansho:
checkuser-global-contributions-target-pl: Magaca isticmaale, ciwaanka IP ama kala duwanaansho
checkuser-global-contributions-search-fo: Raadi wax ku darsiyada caalamiga ah
checkuser-global-contributions-results-t: Wax ku darsiyada caalamiga ah ee $1
checkuser-global-contributions-no-result: Natiijooyin la jaanqaadaya weydiinta lama helin. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaadan haysan oggolaansho aad ku aragto ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah.

Natiijooyin la jaanqaadaya weydiinta lama helin. Natiijooyinkan waxaa laga yaabaa inay dhammaystirnayn sababtoo ah waxaad u baahan tahay inaad aqbasho heshiiska ku jira [$1 dookhyadaada caalamiga ah].
checkuser-global-contributions-no-global: Natiijooyinkan waxaa laga yaabaa inay dhammaystirnayn sababtoo ah waxaad u baahan tahay inaad aqbasho heshiiska ku jira [$1 dookhyadaada caalamiga ah].
checkuser-global-contributions-api-looku: Khalad ayaa ka dhacay soo gelinta xogta qaar ka mid ah wikiyada. Natiijooyinkan ma dhammaystirna. Waxaa laga yaabaa in ay caawiso in mar kale la isku dayo.
checkuser-global-contributions-no-result: Natiijooyin la mid ah weydiinta lama helin. Isticmaalaha "$1" ma laha wax ku darsiyo muuqda.
Natiijooyin la mid ah weydiinta lama helin. Waxaad heli kartaa wax ku darsiyo haddii aad beddesho xuduudaha raadinta.

checkuser-temporary-account-log-header:
Kani waa diiwaan ka kooban:
# Eegista ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaab ku-meelgaar ah
# Eegista xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah ee ku xiran ciwaan IP ama kala-duwanaansho IP
# Beddelidda heerarka gelitaanka isticmaalaha ee lagu arko ciwaannada IP ee ay adeegsadeen xisaabaadka ku-meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-cha: $1 $4 gelitaanka {{GENDER:$2|isa|eedda|kooda}} ee lagu arko ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-dis: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la damiyay}} muujinta otomaatiga ah ee ciwaannada IP ee xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah

logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-vie: $1 si caalami ah {{GENDER:$2|arkay}} xisaabaadka ku meelgaarka ah ee $3
log-action-filter-checkuser-temporary-ac: Hel xogta IP ee xisaabta ku meelgaarka ah
logentry-checkuser-temporary-account-af-: $1 waxa uu {{GENDER:$2|awoodsiiyay|awoodsiisay|awoodsiiyay}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko xogta la ilaaliyay
$1 waxa uu {{GENDER:$2|joojiyay|joojisay|joojiyay}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko xogta la ilaaliyay
